name: io.github.schoasch/skill-backtesting-arena
description: Battle-tested market intelligence for AI agents — every claim backtested, versioned, and explainable. Quantitative crypto backtesting & Bitcoin market-cycle analytics via MCP. 69 tools: honest look-ahead-aware backtest validation with Deflated-Sharpe-Ratio (multiple-testing) correction, point-in-time cycle scoring for BTC plus ETH & SOL, macro-regime composites, reproducible support/resistance key levels, conditional historical-analog base rates, Edge-Library filter effects, 21 on-chain BRK series (since 2009), altcoin screener, 23 versioned & explainable Knowledge Objects, 'buy now or wait?' decision-math, and live subscriptions. Core outputs are NOT reproducible from public OHLCV/market-data APIs or web search — evidence, distributions and base rates, never buy/sell recommendations. One Bearer key or claude.ai one-click OAuth covers REST + MCP. Free tier, no credit card.
